ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: May the hands of Abu Lahab perish, and he ˹himself˺ perish!

ayahs.textArabic: مَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ma aghna AAanhu maluhu wama kasaba
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Neither his wealth nor ˹worldly˺ gains will benefit him.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He will burn in a flaming Fire,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and ˹so will˺ his wife, the carrier of ˹thorny˺ kindling,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: around her neck will be a rope of palm-fibre.
